data.title: DeepSeek plans to release key codes and data to the public starting next week
data.description:
DeepSeek is ready to show the world the core of its technology. The Chinese AI star plans to share key codes and data with the public starting next week. This move will clear the air of accusations of copying Silicon Valley tech giants’ technologies.  DeepSeek announced, “We’re a tiny team exploring AGI. Starting next week, […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/deepseek-to-release-key-codes-data-to-public/

data.title: D.O.G.E employee who posted racist content gets job back
data.description:
Marko Elez, a former Department of Government Efficiency (D.O.G.E) staffer, has been reinstated in a federal role despite his resignation earlier this month after getting exposed for having racist and eugenicist views. According to a Bloomberg report today, Elez is now back on the government payroll, working at the Social Security Administration (SSA)—a federal agency […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/man-who-posted-racist-content-gets-job-back/

data.title: Safemoon executive pleads guilty in $200M fraud case as project pivots to memecoin strategy
data.description:
Former Safemoon Chief Technology Officer (CTO) Thomas Smith has pleaded guilty to charges related to a $200 million fraud scheme tied to the controversial crypto project. On Feb. 20, investigative YouTuber Stephen Findeisen, known as Coffeezilla, reported the development, recalling that he had exposed Safemoon’s fraudulent practices three years ago. At the time, the project […]
The post...
source: https://cryptoslate.com/safemoon-executive-pleads-guilty-in-200m-fraud-case-as-project-pivots-to-memecoin-strategy/

data.title: Centrifuge Appoints New CEO As Leadership Changes
data.description: According to Foresight News, Bhaji Illuminati has been appointed as the new Chief Executive Officer of Centrifuge, a company specializing in the tokenization of real-world assets (RWA). Illuminati, who previously served as the Chief Marketing Officer, succeeds Lucas Vogelsang. Vogelsang will transition to the company's board of directors to focus on strategic initiatives.

data.title: Justin Sun: Huobi HTX will strongly deploy the crypto market in the CIS region
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News On February 21, the "2025 HTX DAO Victoria Harbour Night-Confidence Journey Hong Kong Station" hosted by HTX DAO was grandly held. Huobi HTX Global Advisor and TRON Founder Sun Yuchen revealed on the spot that Huobi HTX has made great progress in the past three years relying on the community, especially in terms of trading volume and new assets. In addition, Huobi HTX's traffic in the CIS region soared in 2024. In the future, it will strongly deploy the CIS regional crypto market, focus on solving the needs of users in the region, and consolidate its market position.
In addition, Sun Yuchen talked about the decentralized stablecoin USDD at the "Hong Kong TRON & HTX DAO Exchange Meeting" on the same day, saying that he had tried many ways to increase user benefits and enhance user experience. USDD focuses on long-term development. The key is to find the right team and leaders, with solid underlying technology and a sound community governance mechanism. During the construction process, it is necessary to ensure substantial progress and prevent the sudden collapse of the project due to issues such as asset security. Only in this way can sustainable and healthy growth be achieved.
Justin Sun also revealed that AI has great potential for application in the field of encryption, especially in building expert models. At this stage, we are exploring an AI application based on DeepSeek with a certain degree of anonymity, combining the characteristics of the encryption field.

data.title: Russia Faces Surge in Crypto Crime, Supreme Court Prepares Legislation
data.description:
Cases where digital currency is the means, income, or object of the crime are on the rise, said the Chairperson of Russia’s Supreme Court.
source: https://decrypt.co/307199/russia-faces-surge-in-crypto-crime-supreme-court-prepares-legislation

data.title: SEC officially drops its case against Coinbase
data.description:
The Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) is abandoning its lawsuit against Coinbase, closing a case that had dragged on for nearly two years and racked up millions in legal fees. The decision, which is pending final approval from the SEC’s commissioners, brings an end to what Coinbase has repeatedly called an “unlawful enforcement case.” Coinbase […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/sec-officially-drops-its-case-against-coinbase/
